build.buildCommand: if [ -d src ]; then cd src; fi && composer install --no-dev --optimize-autoloader && npm ci --include=dev && npm run build && test -f public/build/manifest.json

deploy.startCommand: if [ -d src ]; then cd src; fi && test -f public/build/manifest.json && php artisan serve --host=0.0.0.0 --port=${PORT}
deploy.preDeployCommand: if [ -d src ]; then cd src; fi && php artisan migrate --force
